description:
Configure bcWebCam to allow scanning the exact same barcode again after a 1.5-second delay. Do this by modifying its initialization file (bcWebCam.ini) typically located in the user's local application data folder (%LOCALAPPDATA%\bcWebCam\). Add or update the 'BcGracePeriod' setting under the '[General]' section so its value is exactly '1500'.

Note: You must ensure the application is closed before editing the configuration file to prevent it from overwriting your changes on exit, and you must start the application again afterward so the new settings are loaded into memory. Leave the application running and visible when you are done.
